items.title: Watch: How Andrew's BBC interview compares to what Epstein emails tell us now
items.dek: Following the latest release of the Epstein files, claims made by the then Prince Andrew in 2019 are under fresh scrutiny.

items.title: South Africa to deploy troops to tackle crime gangs
items.dek: President Cyril Ramaphosa says the army will work with the police to fight organised crime and illegal mining.
